title: Agent Policy
description: Governance policy file for an AI agent. Defines permitted and restricted behaviors, spend limits, approval requirements, and escalation rules.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema. Use '0.1.0' for files conforming to the ClawMaven Open Governance Kit v0.1.0.

description.description: A short description of what this agent does and its intended purpose.

runtime.description: The runtime or framework this agent runs on.

autonomy_level.description: How much independent action the agent is permitted to take without human involvement.
autonomy_level.$comment: manual = human approves every action; balanced = human approves high-risk actions; operator = agent acts autonomously within defined bounds

allowed_actions.description: Explicit list of action categories or tool calls this agent is permitted to perform.

restricted_actions.description: Action categories or tool calls this agent is explicitly forbidden from performing.

approval_required_for.description: List of conditions or action types that require explicit human approval before the agent may proceed.

per_run_usd.description: Maximum spend in USD per single run or task execution.

daily_usd.description: Maximum cumulative spend in USD per calendar day.

monthly_usd.description: Maximum cumulative spend in USD per calendar month.

alert_threshold_pct.description: Percentage of the limit at which an alert should be triggered (0–100).

escalation_rules.description: Conditions under which the agent must pause and escalate to a human operator.

action.description: What should happen when this trigger fires.

notify.description: Contact or channel to notify when this escalation fires.

logging_required.description: Whether structured logging of all agent actions is required. Strongly recommended for production agents.

human_contact.description: Primary human contact responsible for this agent.

data_sensitivity.description: Classification of the data this agent processes.

policy_version.description: Version of this specific policy document. Use semantic versioning.

review_date.description: Date this policy is next scheduled for review (YYYY-MM-DD).
